_doc: Per-track manual overrides for derive-capture-frame.mjs. Keyed by slug. Use ONLY when OSM can't place a circuit (street circuits, public-road layouts) and the declared latitude/longitude isn't the true centroid. Fields (all optional): center [lat, lon] forces the capture center; web_span_km / master_span_km force those spans (km). Anything omitted is derived normally. The leading underscore keeps this doc key from matching any slug.

some-street-circuit.note: OSM has no full loop; centroid read off a basemap
